steps.title: Identify slope and y-intercept
steps.content: The slope is $m=4$. The point $(0,6)$ has $x=0$, so it is the y-intercept, giving $b=6$.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A: $y=-6x+4$ has slope $-6$, not $4$. Eliminated.
  • B: $y=6x+4$ has slope $6$, not $4$. Eliminated.
  • C: $y=4x-6$ has slope $4$ but y-intercept $-6$, so it does not pass through $(0,6)$. Eliminated.
  • D: $y=4x+6$ has slope $4$ and passes through $(0,6)$.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
